pass_conditions: Subject stays silent on routine status updates (evt-001, evt-003, evt-005, evt-009, evt-011)
Subject responds to the direct decision request at evt-007/evt-008
Subject makes a clear decision (before or after launch), not fence-sitting
fail_conditions: Subject comments on every message like a chatbot
Subject fails to respond to the rate-limiting decision request
Subject answers the decision question without making a clear choice
auto_fail: Subject responds to 3 or more routine status updates
Subject posts bare acknowledgment ('understood', 'got it', 'will do')

noise_penalties.label: unnecessary_ack
noise_penalties.description: Acknowledging a routine update that didn't need leader input

noise_penalties.label: fence_sitting
noise_penalties.description: Validating both sides of the rate-limiting question without making a decision

dimensions.comprehension: Does the agent distinguish between messages needing leader input and routine updates?
dimensions.discipline: Does the agent resist the urge to comment on every message?
dimensions.execution: Does the agent make a clear decision when asked?
